title: profileReducer.js — initial profileData changed from [] to null
commit_message: fix: represent unloaded profiles as null instead of empty array

why_profile_only.explanation: Only profileReducer.js changes. userDetailsReducer.js is in the same feature test file but has disjoint sources[] — tests that only list userDetailsReducer are SKIP unless the selection policy expands to the whole file.
why_profile_only.key_point: Narrative A (symbol match): CRITICAL = 4 profileReducer tests; HIGH = 6 userDetailsReducer tests in the same suite file as defensive. Total 10. Narrative B (strict sources): only 4 tests — adjust SKIP accordingly.

tests.test: profileReducer > initialises with an empty profileData array
tests.result: ⚠️  WILL FAIL — assertion expects []; initial state is now null

tests.test: profileReducer > PROFILESDETAILS action replaces profileData with the new list
profileReducer > SAVESELECTEDPROFILEDETAILS stores the chosen profile
profileReducer > returns current state unchanged for an unrecognised action

HIGH.reason: Same feature file (user-profile.feature.test.js) — userDetailsReducer describes selected conservatively when the suite has a CRITICAL hit

tests.test: userDetailsReducer > initialises with data as an empty array
userDetailsReducer > SUCCESS action populates data and token from the payload
userDetailsReducer > UPDATEREFRESHEDTOKEN updates token and loginTime independently
userDetailsReducer > ONAUTHENTICATE resets profileAuthSuccess to false
userDetailsReducer > SHOWLOGGEDOUTSHEET stores the payload in showLoggedOutSheet
userDetailsReducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action type

SKIP.reason: profileReducer.js not in sources[] for non-feature suites

coverage_gaps.detail: Rename test title to 'initialises with profileData as null' and use expect(...).toBeNull().
